user.title: Jebao MLW Local
user.description: Leave manual IP addresses empty to scan the local network. The integration stores the discovered device ID and resolves the current IP address again on every reconnect.

discovered.title: Discovered Jebao pumps

error.already_configured: All discovered pumps are already configured.
error.cannot_discover: No new Jebao pump was discovered. You can enter IP addresses manually.
error.invalid_host: Enter at least one valid IP address.

init.title: Jebao MLW Local options
init.description: Edit the fallback IP addresses. When a device ID was discovered, the integration will still resolve the current IP by UDP before connecting.

error.invalid_host: Enter at least one valid fallback IP address.
